articles.title: Summer House reunion concludes....but are you ready for the Aftermath?
articles.description: -THe 3 part Summer House reunion has officially concluded. Bringing an end to the 2 highest rated Summer House episodes IN HISTORY and on Bravo this year. -But just because it's over doesn't mean that Bravo is ready to let it go....in a Bravo first, we are getting 1 more episode. -Summer House: The Aftermath will pick up in present day (filmed within the past 3 weeks) and follow Meija speaking to Ciara Miller, Kyle Cooke sits down with West Wilson, and Lindsay Hubbard hears Amanda Batula out. articles.title: Persona 4 Revival Preorders Are Now Open, Including A Massive Collector’s Edition
articles.description: Persona 4 Revival Standard Edition $70 | Releases February 18, 2027 Preorder at Amazon View at other stores Preorder at Best Buy Preorder at GameStop Persona 4 Revival Collector's Edition $250 | Releases February 18, 2027 Preorder at Amazon View at other stores Preorder at Best Buy Preorder at GameStop Persona 4 returns with a ground-up remake for PS5, Xbox Series X, and PC dubbed Persona 4 Revival launching February 18, 2027. Preorders for the physical edition are open now at multiple retailers, and grabbing the game early gets you a selection of in-game bonuses. The game will also be available on Xbox Game Pass at launch. Persona 4 Revival Preorder Bonuses If you place a preorder via any retailer, you'll get a P3R & P5R Extra BGM Set. Placing your preorder through Amazon will also get you an exclusive bonus: A set of four double-sided character cards with their matching Personas on the flip sides. Persona 4 Revival Standard Edition $70 | Releases February 18, 2027 The Persona 4 Revival Standard Edition includes the full base game plus the P3R and P4% Extra BGM Set DLC is you preorder. Physical preorders are available for PS5 and Xbox Series X. Digital preorders are available on console and PC. It's also worth noting there is a UK-exclusive Steelbook edition available for $78 at Amazon.co.uk , which ships to the US if you're interested in a bonus. Preorder at Amazon Preorder at Best Buy Preorder at GameStop Persona 4 Revival Collector's Edition $250 | Releases February 18, 2027 The Persona 4 Revival Collector's Edition includes the base game and preorder bonuses, plus several physical collectibles like a statue of Izanagi and the protagonist standing atop a pile of TVs, a steelbook game case, artbook, and more. Check out the full list of Collector's Edition content below: Base Game Protagonist & Izanagi Statue Steelbook case Artbook Keycaps & Keychain DLC - Costume Set, Persona Set, BGM Set Collector's Box Preorder at Amazon Preorder at Best Buy Preorder at GameStop Persona 4 Revival Digital Editions $70-$100 | Releases February 18, 2026 Two of the digital versions of Persona 4 Revival come with their own unique set of bonus items. The regular edition does not come with any extras, but the Digital Deluxe Edition and the Digital Premium Edition come with fun character outfits and BGM sets listed below. Digital preorders are available on consoles and PC, and Steam players can save up to 13% by preordering at Fanatical . Persona 4 Revival Digital Deluxe Edition includes: Persona 4 Revival P4R: Velvet Outfit Set P4R: P3R Persona Set 1 & Persona Set 2 P4R: P5R Persona Set 1 & Persona Set 2 Persona 4 Revival Digital Premium Edition includes: Persona 4 Revival P4R: Velvet Outfit Set P4R: P3R S.E.E.S. Uniform Set P4R: P5R Phantom Thieves Costume Set P4R: P3R Persona Set 1 & Persona Set 2 P4R: P5R Persona Set 1 & Persona Set 2 P4R: P3R BGM Set P4R: P5R BGM Set There is also a UK-exclusive edition of the game that comes with the steelbook, which retails for $78 on Amazon.co.uk . It does ship to the US, in case you're interested in a steelbook option without all the additional items in the Collector's Edition. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1osdiOAkBKc We gave Persona 4 Golden high marks in our 2023 review , and they were well-deserved. If you missed out on its original release, Persona 4 Revival will give you a perfect excuse to try out this highly acclaimed RPG. Atlus also remade Persona 3 in 2024 as Persona 3 Reload , which got equally high marks from us in its review . "Simply put, Reload is the greatest way to experience Persona 3’s story, and Persona 3’s story is one well worth experiencing," GameSpot's Jessica Cogswell wrote. While older entries in the Persona series continue to get the glow-up, Atlus also revealed our first look at Persona 6 on Sunday, June 7. The trailer doesn't reveal much about the story to come or mention a release date, but as some leakers predicted, the entry's signature color appears to be green. Disclosure: GameSpot and Fanatical are both owned by Fandom.
